prior_findings_resolution.verification: .gitleaks.toml now has a populated [allowlist] with a path-based regex entry covering forked-e2e.test.ts. The comment correctly explains the keys are publicly-documented Foundry test fixtures not production secrets. The regex uses the correct gitleaks path-allowlist syntax (TOML raw string triple-quoted). PASS.

arc-testnet-e2e.test.ts line 148: `const relayerKey = new OpaqueRelayerKey(requireEnv('PAYWALL_RELAYER_KEY'));` — no plain-string intermediate. The wrapped reference `relayerKey` is used directly in the PaywallConfig at line 200. Comment at lines 143-146 documents the D13 rationale. PASS.

arc-testnet-e2e.test.ts line 149: `payerAccount = privateKeyToAccount(requireEnv('ARC_TESTNET_PAYER_PK') as '0x${string}');` — no plain-string intermediate. Raw key is consumed directly by viem's privateKeyToAccount which does not hold a reference to the raw string after account derivation. PASS.

overall_assessment: All three round-1 findings are correctly resolved. No new findings introduced by the changes. The implementation is clean from a security perspective.
